privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for vtiger_crm_env telemarketer_log_call_and_task task by confirming that the prerequisite Lead ('David Miller' at 'Maersk Logistics'), Event ('Initial Discovery Call'), and Task ('Send Maersk Pricing Deck') are synthetically generated directly through the task description instructions. Verified that the expected target lead source ('Cold Call'), industry ('Transportation'), task priority ('High'), and specific expected dates ('2026-03-08' and '2026-03-15') exactly match the explicit task instructions, export_result.sh database queries, and verifier.py evaluation logic.
